title: Elemental Metals [Magical Metallurgy Series]
description: Infuse metals with the power of magic!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- Runes
### Strongly recommended
- Roughly Enough Items - to see the added recipes!
# ✨ Features
This mod adds new ingots to obtain and craft, one for each element.

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7203ff49f7b96bbef2a40d92e62394eab1183ee.png)

The list comprend for iron and netherite:

- Arcane infused ingots, nuggets and blocks
- Fire infused ingots, nuggets and blocks
- Frost infused ingots, nuggets and blocks
- Healing infused ingots, nuggets and blocks
- Lightning infused ingots, nuggets and blocks
- Soul infused ingots, nuggets and blocks
